story_summary: A vocabulary-learning motion graphic introduces the word epiphany as a question on a blurred dictionary page, expands into a glowing semantic cloud around an anonymous silhouette, then resolves into a bilingual definition card with an example sentence and memory-score footer.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus ffmpeg still extraction at representative timestamps and transition-window inspection
source_sampling.notes: Representative frames were captured around 1.5s, 6.7s, and 13.0s, with additional checks around the mid-sequence typography buildup to confirm the three-scene structure.

audio_notes: Source audio was extracted to source_audio.mp3 for packaging. The soundtrack was reused as-is and not separately transcribed.

scenes.summary: A faux dictionary spread fills the frame with heavy blur and shallow-depth motion while the highlighted word epiphany appears large at center with a red question mark, framed by oversized cropped typography from surrounding dictionary text.

camera.movement: subtle push and blur drift inside a static editorial layout
camera.stability: fully designed motion graphic with no live camera

on_screen_text: Red question mark after the word
Background dictionary fragments remain blurred and only partially readable
scenes.environment: Bright paper-like dictionary texture with soft gray text columns and a yellow highlight block under the main word.
overlay_observations: No inserted photos or picture-in-picture layers. The entire scene is a single editorial composition built from typography, blur, and highlight shapes.

scenes.summary: The design cuts to a dark neural or cosmic background where repeated mini glossary entries for epiphany orbit a center-aligned yellow title and pronunciation, while a black anonymous silhouette anchors the lower center and a memory-score footer bar grows along the bottom.

camera.framing: wide graphic tableau with centered hero word and lower-center silhouette
camera.movement: glow pulses, word accumulation, and light background parallax
camera.stability: code-driven animation rather than handheld footage

on_screen_text: Central short definition: n. giác ngộ
Repeated peripheral mini entries including n. giác ngộ, n. Lễ Hiển Linh, and n. nhận thức đột ngột
Bottom memory footer such as Nạp từ vào trí nhớ: 36%
scenes.environment: Dark starfield and branching electric glow pattern radiating behind a faceless silhouette.
overlay_observations: The silhouette is part of the designed animation, not a separate live-action insert.
Small glossary entries are independently positioned text clusters rather than one flat background image.

scenes.summary: The sequence resolves onto a clean black definition card showing a large outlined EPIPHANY title, pronunciation, a longer Vietnamese definition, a yellow example label, bilingual example sentences, and a high completion-score footer.

camera.movement: text fade-and-lift reveals with otherwise stable card composition
camera.stability: static graphic layout with subtle code-driven entry motion

on_screen_text: Definition line: n. giác ngộ, Lễ Hiển Linh, nhận thức đột ngột
English example sentence beginning Failure became an epiphany...
Vietnamese example translation beginning Thất bại trở thành...
Bottom memory footer: Nạp từ vào trí nhớ: 91%
scenes.environment: Minimal black card with soft title glow and a pale gray footer strip.
overlay_observations: No live-action footage remains in the payoff scene; it is entirely editorial text and shape design.
